Social media operating system Review before reach

Private beta

Plan, review, and publish without losing the thread.

Sources 16 approved memory items
Review Human gate No auto-posting
Human gate - on No auto-posting

A control room for brand memory, AI-assisted drafts, human approval, and connector-safe publishing. The platform is ElevateMindStudio; the first live campaign is AlgoProven.

Request access
Open workspace

Private beta intake

Request access to the operating room.

Tell us what brand you want to run through ElevateMindStudio and which channels matter first. This keeps the early workspace focused on real accounts, real approvals, and real publishing constraints.

Feature 01 - The platform

One operating layer between ideas, approvals, and publishing.

Built around source-of-truth content, review state, connector readiness, and a clear separation between the platform and every managed brand campaign.

Brand memory comes first. Approved sources, campaign notes, links, and decisions become the base layer for every draft the system generates, so the AI works from owned context instead of guesswork.

Approval is never an afterthought. Review status stays visible before content is queued, posted, or handed to a scheduler.

Feature 01

Brand memory

Approved sources, decisions, campaign notes, links, and positioning stay attached to every generated draft.

Feature 02

Approval first

Every publish route keeps human review visible before content can reach a queue or scheduler.

Feature 03

Connector aware

Channels are tracked as ready, waiting on verification, rate-limited, or intentionally skipped.

Feature 02 - The workflow

Designed around review before reach.

The MVP connects the workspace to a production API, Buffer dry-run validation, YouTube status, legal pages, and explicit publish gates. LinkedIn and Discord stay staged until their verifications are approved.

Draft Review Queue Dry-run
A.

Plan

Capture the audience, offer, source links, campaign pillar, and publishing intent in one workspace.

B.

Produce

Generate AI drafts against approved context, not loose prompts or disconnected notes.

C.

Publish

Move approved posts through connector checks before real scheduling is enabled.

Status desk

Where every channel stands today.

Buffer validates the publish path while direct APIs finish approvals. Nothing is auto-posted.

Open live workspace
BufferLive
YouTubeOAuth ready
LinkedInReview pending
DiscordVerify pending

The last word - first campaign

AlgoProven is the first managed brand inside the platform.

Platform - ElevateMindStudio

Owns the product, API, workspace, legal pages, and integration layer.

Campaign - AlgoProven

Owns the social channels, audience, content themes, and campaign output.

A private social media operations platform for planning, reviewing, approving, and publishing brand content.
